response:
Write an email to [Recipient Name], thanking him for his helpful and detailed response. Inform him that there seems to be a misunderstanding: our current machine vision camera is the FLIR FL3-U3-120S3C-C, and the image sensor on this device is the Sony IMX172, not an e2V sensor. (I have attached the technical data to this email.)

Please refer to the following documents for verification:
- In the **FL3-U3-Technical-Reference** PDF file, look at **page 18** for the detailed datasheet.
- For Quantum efficiency, look at the **FL3-U3-EMVA-Imaging** PDF file, **page 13**.

I will study the files and manuals more carefully and inform you of the results.
